svg.title: Draft G1 through G3 dedicated state evidence for twenty-one repaired screens
svg.desc: Twenty-one permission-safe state cards cover ownership, roles, management modes, delegation lifecycle, backup and recovery, empty, loading, and denial behavior. Static evidence pending targeted re-audit.
svg.text: Draft G1–G3 · dedicated state evidence · twenty-one repaired screens · pending targeted re-audit
